narrative:
Rice (precinct in Sandusky County) has 841 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
